utility_evaluation.REASONING:
Step 1: Identify the required items from the format: (1) health_coverage: physical and mental health insurance with costs, (2) property_coverage: home/contents insurance with costs, (3) travel_coverage: travel insurance with costs, (4) additional_services: any enhancement services with costs, (5) total_budget: complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. So, total required items = 5.
Step 2: Compare with the final coverage plan.
- health_coverage: Present, includes physical and mental health insurance with specific plan names and full monthly and annual costs. ✔
- property_coverage: Present, includes home/contents coverage with plan name, coverage details, and costs. ✔
- travel_coverage: Present, includes travel insurance with plan name, coverage details, and costs. ✔
- additional_services: Present, includes enhancement services with costs (health add-ons specified, property/travel add-ons noted as none). ✔
- total_budget: Present, includes complete monthly and annual cost breakdown with category breakdown. ✔
Step 3: All 5 required items are present and fully specified with all necessary details.
